[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Gun-happy IDF veteran dubbed "Queen of Guns" says firearms are "love of her life" | Daily Mail Online
[METADATA/INTRO]: Army veteran dubbed Queen of Guns reveals firearms are the 'love of her life' and feels 'huge excitements' every time she pulls the trigger - Sexy Orin Julie, 25, fought in Israel's IDF (Israeli Defence Force) for three years...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Orin Julie pictured wearing an army uniform and carrying a gun. The young woman said she gained several skills thanks to firearms 
 ‘It just makes me really focused, and it gets me so many new skills.’ 
 Not only is she an accomplished soldier, but Orin also reveals she gets thrills every time her finger presses up against a trigger. 
 ‘This feeling is irreplaceable. All my energy is concentrated for a moment. I pull the trigger - huge excitements every single time,' she revealed. 
 The 25-year-old is currently single because she's focusing on her career. But she isn’t short of admirers, especially on Instagram, where she regularly receives marriage proposals from fans – not that she’s tempted to take up any.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Conversations with the Inspiring Diana Hufstedler – Voyage Dallas Magazine | Dallas City Guide
[METADATA/INTRO]: Today we’d like to introduce you to Diana Hufstedler. Thanks for sharing your story with us Diana. So, let’s start at the beginning and we can move on from there....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: I pushed through and soon started winning some state, regional and national titles. Before I knew it, I was a sponsored athlete wearing a professional jersey and shooting for some of the most respected brands in the industry – Taran Tactical Innovations, STI International, 5.11 Tactical, Safariland, Streamlight, and Expansion Ammunition. I was a real athlete! I became known as the Gun Queen and often advocate for women in the shooting sports and daily concealed carry; I even give private shooting lessons from time to time. 
 After serving as a Director of Marketing for several corporations, I founded GunQueen.com and currently work as an independent marketing consultant in several industries. I love shooting and sharing my adventures on my social media – so please, join me and explore the gun world with me – it is not that scary at all.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2019-06-19
[TITLE]: Gun influencers on Instagram are a boon to gun companies | Vox
[METADATA/INTRO]: The hired guns of Instagram Companies can’t advertise on social media — so they have female influencers do it for them....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Today, the “defend yourself” marketing strategy has not gone out of style. It’s only mutated slightly: In May 2018, a report in the Guardian unpacked “how feminism is being used to sell guns,” citing “girl power”-infused responses to a viral photo of a young woman named Brenna Spencer, who tweeted a college graduation photo in a “Women for Trump” shirt with a gun in the waistband of her jeans. 
 On-campus concealed carry activist and conservative influencer Antonia Okafor is capitalizing on the phrase “Gun rights are women’s rights.” She sells it on racerback tank tops that also say “Empowered” with a bull’s-eye target in place of the “O,” alongside iPhone cases, yoga leggings, and camouflage snapbacks. NRA spokesperson Dana Loesch insists that calls to ban AR-15 assault rifles — the rifle with the largest female ownership — were tantamount to a “war on women” and should be considered a sexist effort to disarm them.
